meta.title: FAQ | AmberNord
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about the AmberNord sea buckthorn elixir: usage, ingredients, tolerability, ordering and shipping.

og.title: FAQ | AmberNord
og.description: Frequently asked questions about the AmberNord sea buckthorn elixir: usage, ingredients, tolerability, ordering and shipping.

items.q: When is the best time to drink AmberNord?
items.a: We recommend starting in the morning with a glass of water at room temperature or slightly chilled – gentle and balanced. A second dose works perfectly at midday – with still or sparkling water, served pleasantly cool, for a refreshing moment of enjoyment and as an alternative to conventional sweetened drinks. Thanks to the small, handy and elegant AmberNord bottle, you can take it everywhere and easily mix the essence into a glass of water, your sports smoothie or a fresh juice. After opening, store cool.

items.q: Should I drink the elixir on an empty stomach?
items.a: For the fastest absorption of nutrients, consumption on an empty stomach (about 15–30 minutes before breakfast) is ideal. With a sensitive stomach, however, we recommend taking it with or after a light meal, since the natural fruit acids are very potent.

items.q: Can I drink AmberNord undiluted?
items.a: We do not recommend it. Our elixir is a highly concentrated raw essence with an extremely intense, sour-bitter taste. The 1:10 principle (with still or sparkling water) guarantees the best taste experience and the optimal tolerance for the stomach.

items.q: Why is sea buckthorn appreciated in haute cuisine as well?
items.a: In high-end gastronomy, sea buckthorn is often called the "lemon of the North". Its complex, multi-dimensional acidity and viscous texture are deliberately used to give modern alcohol-free cocktails (No-ABV) a flavour "bite", or to create a balanced profile in gourmet dishes that elegantly cuts through the heaviness of fats.

items.q: What bioactive substances are exactly in the essence?
items.a: Sea buckthorn is a complex phytochemical wonder. Our unfiltered essence delivers the complete spectrum of essential Omega fatty acids (3, 6, 7 and 9) from a single plant source. In addition, there are over 180 bioactive compounds, 17 vitamins (including A, C and E) and 14 minerals in highest bioavailability.

items.q: Why is the interplay of pulp and seed so important?
items.a: Sea buckthorn is an extremely complex phyto-system. The pulp oil is one of the rarest plant sources of palmitoleic acid (Omega-7) — a fatty acid that also occurs naturally in the human skin matrix. The seed oil, on the other hand, provides Omega-3 and Omega-6 in a physiologically ideal ratio. Because we process the entire berry, these valuable fatty acids are fully retained in the essence.

items.q: Why does an orange layer settle at the top of the bottle?
items.a: That is an absolute mark of quality! Sea buckthorn is one of the few berries that contains valuable plant oils directly in the pulp. Because our essence is 100% naturally pure and we forgo artificial emulsifiers or industrial centrifugation, the oil settles naturally. Please shake the bottle well before each use.

items.q: How much Vitamin C does one serving contain?
items.a: Even a small serving (about 25 ml) of the raw essence delivers several times the daily requirement of Vitamin C — sea buckthorn naturally contains 9× more Vitamin C than citrus fruit. Thanks to our extremely precise, gentle pasteurisation, these heat-sensitive vitamins are preserved optimally – unlike industrially overheated mass-market products.

items.q: Is sea buckthorn also suitable for skin care from within?
items.a: The valuable pulp oil is particularly rich in palmitoleic acid (Omega-7) – with a natural share of up to 32–42 %. This rare fatty acid also occurs in the human skin matrix. In addition, Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of skin.

items.q: Does the sea buckthorn elixir contain Vitamin B12?
items.a: Sea buckthorn contains B12-like compounds (analogues). By current knowledge, it is not considered a reliable source of B12 — anyone who needs to supplement Vitamin B12 specifically should do so separately.

items.q: What makes Omega-7 so special?
items.a: Palmitoleic acid (Omega-7) is one of the rarest fatty acids in the plant kingdom — sea buckthorn pulp oil reaches a record concentration of up to 42 %. We process the whole berry so that this natural component is fully retained in the essence.

items.q: Are there interactions with medications?
items.a: Persons taking blood-thinning medications (anticoagulants) should consult their doctor due to the natural Vitamin K content of sea buckthorn.

items.q: Can side effects occur with excessive consumption?
items.a: Because this is a highly potent natural product with plenty of fruit acid, extremely excessive consumption can cause mild heartburn. Stick to the recommended 1:10 ritual and it is very well tolerated.

items.q: Is AmberNord organic-certified and tested to Swiss standards?
items.a: Yes. AmberNord is an officially accredited organic importer in Switzerland and is audited regularly by the independent certification body ProCert. We work consistently to the strictest Swiss quality and organic guidelines to guarantee absolute purity, transparency and safety for our elixir.

items.q: What sets the AmberNord elixir apart from conventional sea buckthorn juices?
items.a: Our elixir is a 100% pure, undiluted raw essence. For every bottle, the purest hand-picked berries are processed. We also cultivate exclusively a specific premium mono variety, botanically selected for maximum oil content and nutrient density, and completely avoid mass-produced, yield-maximised industrial varieties.

items.q: Why is AmberNord so valuable and how is the sea buckthorn harvested?
items.a: Harvesting nordic sea buckthorn is highly complex because the berries burst immediately under mechanical pressure and oxidise quickly. Large industrial facilities often use destructive "cut-and-freeze" methods that strip the bush of carbohydrate reserves. Our production partner, on the other hand, relies exclusively on gentle hand-picking by over 100 seasonal workers. This gentle method protects the plant's anatomy and secures the highest quality of native lipids.

items.q: How is the elixir processed and do the vitamins remain intact?
items.a: To obtain the 100% pure elixir, hand-picked berries are gently cold-pressed. A very gentle pasteurisation then follows. This eliminates germs and ensures shelf life, but prevents thermal degradation of sensitive ingredients. The valuable Omega fatty acids and the high Vitamin C content thus remain intact.

items.q: What does your zero-waste approach mean exactly?
items.a: We guarantee a fully residue-free production process. After cold-pressing, skins and seeds are gently milled into fibre-rich powder. The leaves, which contain the unique antioxidant plastochromanol-8 (PC-8), also find use in functional teas. We use 100% of the harvested biomass and avoid any waste.

items.q: Do you also use the bark of the sea buckthorn?
items.a: Yes, as part of our holistic philosophy. The bark of the sea buckthorn branches also contains valuable secondary plant compounds. These flow into functional formulations — nothing from the plant goes to waste.

items.q: Why do you use glass bottles instead of plastic?
items.a: Glass is absolutely taste-neutral and does not release microplastic particles into the elixir. Our special glass also optimally protects the bioactive ingredients and guarantees the highest clinical purity of the raw essence.

items.q: When will I receive my elixir?
items.a: We ship directly from our logistics centre in Aarau. As a rule, your parcel arrives within 1–3 working days.

items.q: What does shipping cost and how fast do you deliver?
items.a: Shipped within 24 h from our logistics centre in Aarau. The Habit and The Protocol: free shipping throughout Switzerland. The Starter: plus shipping costs (shown at checkout).

items.q: How does the 30-day money-back guarantee work?
items.a: Not convinced? Contact us by e-mail within 30 days of receipt — you will get the full purchase price back, simply and without giving a reason.

items.q: Which payment methods do you accept?
items.a: TWINT, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay and PayPal — all payments run encrypted via Stripe.

items.q: How can I change or cancel my subscription?
items.a: At any time, with no notice period: via the link in your order confirmation or by e-mail. The next unshipped delivery is stopped.

items.q: Is AmberNord suitable during pregnancy, breastfeeding or when taking medication?
items.a: Sea buckthorn is a food. During pregnancy, while breastfeeding or when taking medication regularly, always discuss new dietary routines with your doctor.

items.q: From what age is the elixir suitable?
items.a: As a normal food, it is in principle suitable for the whole family; for children we recommend a stronger dilution to taste.

items.q: How do I store the bottle after opening?
items.a: Keep refrigerated and enjoy within 10 days — we completely avoid artificial preservatives.
